data.body: Done (commit pending). execution_mode {single_turn,agentic} enum on prompt front-matter (default agentic, reject invalid); runner single_turn = one structured call, tools=[]/toolsets=[], validated vs prompt.outputs (build_agent_request dispatch seam; raises if no outputs); agentic unchanged. Inspector surfaces agent prompt contracts (ServiceTask ContractEntry, bundle rebuilt). prompt_override_drift flags override outputs drift via lint_workflow. 316 tests green incl offline single_turn + direct no-tools assertion + live external test (inert). Verified dispatch logic + no-tools branch directly.
